slug_convention: The :latest tag is the default for any model and MUST be omitted from model names and slugs. Only explicit non-default tags (e.g. :14b, :q8_0, :bf16) are included.

backend_notes.qwen3.5:35b-a3b-q2_k_l: Runs via llama-server/OpenAI-compatible API on this host. Ollama 0.17.8-rc4 still fails to load qwen35moe.
backend_notes.omnicoder:9b-q4_k_m: Benchmarked via llama-server/OpenAI-compatible API on this host. Ollama 0.17.8-rc4 imports it, but local runner allocation fails on this machine.
backend_notes.qwen3.5:27b-claude-4.6-opus-reasoning-di: Benchmarked via llama-server/OpenAI-compatible API on this host. Ollama 0.17.8-rc4 imports it, but local runner cannot load qwen35.
Benchmarked via llama-server/OpenAI-compatible API on this host. This smaller follow-up quant improves memory use and speed versus Q3_K_M, but still only scores 1/5 on the quick suite.

backend_notes.nemotron-cascade-2: T5500: cannot load. MoE 30B-A3B model needs 22.6 GiB system memory; T5500 has 36GB RAM + 12GB VRAM but only ~22.4 GiB available after OS/CUDA overhead. Even smallest HF quant (IQ1_S) is 18GB due to MoE floor. Crashes Ollama service on load attempt. Strix-only (5/5, 27.83 tok/s there).
